services.name: AI API
services.description: Unified AI provider — Claude, Ollama, Mistral. Chat completions, embeddings, OCR, summarization, topic extraction.

services.name: Intelligence API
services.description: Web crawling, screenshot capture, transcript generation, and intelligence gathering with vector search.

services.name: Agent Memory
services.description: Hierarchical memory for AI agents. Three layers: Resources (raw) → Items (facts) → Categories (summaries). Temporal awareness with decay.

services.name: Document Index
services.description: Vectorless RAG document indexing using PageIndex. PDF/markdown indexing, YouTube transcripts, LLM-powered document chat.

services.name: Document Partitioning
services.description: Document parsing and element extraction via Unstructured library. PDF, DOCX, images, email, markdown.

services.name: Generative AI Proxy
services.description: Thin FastAPI proxy for ComfyUI generative AI backend. Health checks, GPU status, sprite generation, output management.

services.name: Text-to-Speech
services.description: Real-time neural text-to-speech powered by VibeVoice. Multiple voice presets, streaming PCM16, complete WAV generation.

services.name: Contact Data ETL
services.description: Contact data processing ETL. Address normalization and parsing via libpostal, batch processing, deduplication hashes.

services.name: Congressional Districts
services.description: 119th Congress, 441 districts. Demographics, GeoJSON boundaries, radio coverage, state data.

services.name: Voter Analysis
services.description: AI-powered voter segment analysis. Demographics vs baseline, behavioral enrichment, affinity scoring, donor propensity.

services.name: Survey Platform (YASP)
services.description: Create surveys, manage questions, collect and analyze responses.

services.name: File Storage & CDN
services.description: S3-compatible object storage via MinIO. Buckets, upload/download, presigned URLs, public CDN.

services.name: City Map Posters
services.description: Minimalist city map poster generation from OpenStreetMap. Vector, raster, and district render modes, 17 themes, 300 DPI PNG output.

services.name: Map Tile Cache
services.description: CartoDB tile caching proxy with look-ahead prefetching. 9 basemap styles for CB mapping apps.

services.name: User Guide Generator
services.description: Automated documentation generation for CB apps. Playwright-based crawling, screenshot capture, markdown generation.

services.name: Geocoding Service
services.description: Geocoding service using Nominatim with OpenStreetMap data. Forward geocoding, reverse geocoding, and OSM object lookup.

services.name: Iterable API Wrapper
services.description: Multi-tenant Iterable API wrapper with local DuckDB sync. Email marketing projects, contacts, campaigns, lists.

services.name: Airtable API Wrapper
services.description: Multi-tenant Airtable API wrapper with local DuckDB sync. Proxies CRUD operations, syncs bases/tables for fast SQL querying.

services.name: SMS/MMS Gateway
services.description: Unified SMS/MMS gateway for Ejoin devices. Single send, bulk send, device management.

services.name: WhatsApp Ingestion
services.description: WhatsApp message ingestion via Node.js relay. Message processing pipeline, AI gist generation.

services.name: Webhook Router
services.description: Centralized webhook ingestion (Typeform, GitHub, Stripe). HMAC verification, async persistence, consumer-scoped access.

services.name: Front Email Proxy
services.description: Front App email integration — inboxes, conversations, messages, drafts, contacts, tags, canned responses, teammates, analytics.

services.name: URL Shortener
services.description: Short links with privacy-preserving click analytics. Custom/auto slugs, expiry, enable/disable.

services.name: Headless Email Client
services.description: Headless email client API for IMAP/SMTP mailbox management. Session-based access, folder management, message CRUD, send/batch-send.

services.name: Infrastructure Manager
services.description: Infrastructure inventory, GitHub issues, project bootstrap, config management (nginx, systemd, DNS, certs), AI orchestration, deployment.

services.name: Network Inventory
services.description: Fleet management for OpenWRT router/VPN/Tor network. Inventory, topology, fleet status, device snapshots.

services.name: TOR Cluster
services.description: Anonymous web fetching through Tor worker pool. Load balancing: round_robin, sticky, random, least_connections.

services.name: Authentication Platform
services.description: Domain-wide PIN authentication gateway for nominate.ai subdomains. HMAC-SHA256, 7-day sessions.

services.name: System Monitor
services.description: Central monitoring, 8 agents, incident management, SMS alerts, AI diagnosis, self-healing.

services.name: Log Query & Analysis
services.description: Read-only log querying and analysis across DC0. 8 log groups, syslog analysis, nginx access/error logs, CB service journals.

services.name: MCP Service Catalog
services.description: MCP server exposing the CB service catalog to LLM agents. SSE transport for remote clients, Inspector UI for humans.

services.name: Scheduled Task Engine
services.description: Configurable scheduled task engine. Cron-based HTTP dispatch with retry logic, overlap protection, run history, timezone support.

services.name: Documentation Site
services.description: MkDocs Material documentation hub for the Campaign Brain platform. Architecture guides, service docs, API catalog.

services.name: API Mesh Gateway
services.description: WebSocket gateway for the API Mesh network. Service discovery, cluster health, request proxying across all registered CB services.

services.name: Claude Code Session Manager
services.description: Claude Code operating system — manage interactive Claude sessions, stash/apply context, AI-powered task routing and prioritization.

services.name: OpenWRT Router Manager
services.description: MCP/API frontend for OpenWRT router management. UCI config CRUD with rollback, network/firewall/wireless monitoring, VPN rotation.

services.name: Campaign Management Platform
services.description: Core campaign management platform. Person/contact CRM, events, campaigns, surveys, walk lists, turf management, voter data, canvass forms.

services.name: Project Management
services.description: Project management and task tracking. Timeline views, kanban boards, resource allocation, milestones.

services.name: Rural AM/FM Rate Ingestion
services.description: Radio station political advertising rates for AI-powered media buying. 2,000+ stations, rate cards with OCR extraction, proposals, FCC data, Nielsen ratings.

services.name: Mobile Canvassing
services.description: Progressive Web App for door-knocking and canvassing. Offline-first with RxDB sync, DuckDB analytics, offline maps.

services.name: Workflow Engine
services.description: Lightweight JSON-backed CRM workflow automation. Contacts, templates, instances, multi-tenant, SMS/email routing.

services.name: Donation Processing
services.description: Campaign donation processing (Transaxt migration). Authorize.Net CIM, 4 portals, 595K donations.

services.name: Hospitality BI (VIP)
services.description: Virgin Islands Pulse — hospitality portfolio BI. Clover POS, Homebase, Cloudbeds, WebRezPro integration.

services.name: Issue Tracking
services.description: Unified GitHub issue management across CB repositories. Full CRUD, comments, project boards.
